title: Simplify setup page — summary view with detail subpages
goal: 설정 메인 페이지를 심플한 요약 뷰로 바꾸고, 상세 설정은 하위 페이지로 분리한다. 메인에는 각 섹션의 상태 요약(연결됨/미연결, 허용/미허용)만 보여주고 '자세히' 버튼으로 상세 페이지로 이동한다.

test_requirements.case: Main setup page shows summary cards only
test_requirements.expected: each section is a compact card with status + detail link

test_requirements.case: AI section shows connected/not connected status
test_requirements.expected: green badge if verified, gray if not

test_requirements.case: Connections section shows count of connected services
Permissions section shows count of allowed permissions
Tools section shows installed/not installed count
Subpages have back button to main setup
test_requirements.expected: each subpage has ← 설정으로 돌아가기 link

constraints: Main setup page should fit on one screen without scrolling for most users
Move existing detailed UI into subpages — do not rewrite, just relocate
Keep mobile tunnel and AI key sections on main page (they are primary setup)
Use existing Tailwind patterns, no new dependencies
Use t() for all new text
Must work in Tauri (no router.push to external URLs)
